response.step_by_step_log: 1. Analyzed video content and observed two distinct song performances: 'Kimi ga Tame' and 'Fuantei na Kamisama'. 2. Identified performers as Hakui Koyori and a guest. 3. Used the search tool to confirm song titles, artists (Suara), and lyrics for both songs. 4. Created scene objects based on song start/end times. 5. Formatted lyrics and metadata into the required JSON schema.
response.global_summary: A live performance featuring Hakui Koyori and a guest singer covering two songs from the 'Utawarerumono' series: 'Kimi ga Tame' and 'Fuantei na Kamisama'.

scenes.description: Introductory segment with the performers standing on stage.
Performance of 'Kimi ga Tame'. On-screen text indicates the song title, lyricist, and composer.

scenes.reference_lyrics_en:
What color am I in your eyes?
If you wish for a deep red, I will give you the sunlight.
Overflowing with sadness, I closed my eyelids.
The spilled drops sink into my heart.
The spreading waves mix weakly.
I will reach for the cradle, in a dream that invites sleep,
I search for the nostalgic silhouette.
I stretch out my hand, and I want to hold you tightly.
ha-
What color am I in your eyes?
If you wish for a deep indigo, I will give you the high sky.
Overflowing with joy, we met.
The spilled smile hides the parting.
People eventually rot away,
But it will become a song and be passed down.
ha-
What color am I in your eyes?
If you wish for a deep green, I will give you this earth.
Fragile and fleeting things,
Strong and beautiful things,
Just as they are.
ha-
What color am I in your eyes?
If you have remembered peace,
I am there.
What color am I in your eyes?
If you wish for a deep hidden thought,
I will give you these feelings,
I will give you all of this.

scenes.reference_lyrics_en:
Unstable God,
Repeating encounters and partings,
Until the day we can meet again,
Traveler through time.
You are crying,
The rain of flowing tears,
I won't say not to cry,
My heart is sad.
Living things,
While carrying something,
Are connected by invisible chains.
How much I must have been saved,
I don't want to lose that innocent smile.
Unstable God,
Repeating past and future,
Born and then dying fate,
In a world where we crossed paths wrong.
Repeating encounters and partings,
Until the day we can meet again,
Traveler through time.
While dyeing the pure heart black,
Cannot be suppressed, it is unleashed.
How many times have I called your name,
The innocent smile is nowhere to be found anymore.
Unstable God,
Inherited dreams and love,
Fate to raise, protect, and entrust,
In a world where we crossed paths wrong.
Even if torn apart to search,
Believing we can meet again,
Traveler through time.
Unstable God,
Repeating past and future,
Born and then dying fate,
In a world where we crossed paths wrong.
Repeating encounters and partings,
Until the day we can meet again,
Traveler through time.
Until the day we can meet again,
Traveler through time.
